title: Smart IPM helps for horticulture adaptation to the new climate change challenges
subtitle: La GIP inteligente ayuda a la adaptación de la horticultura a los nuevos retos del cambio climático
description: A guide outlining SMART Integrated Pest Management solutions for vegetable producers to address increasing pest pressures driven by climate change. It emphasizes the role of biological control, cross-regional knowledge sharing, and technical advisory services to prevent pesticide resistance and support sustainable horticulture.
